title: Skateboard accessory
abstract: A skateboard is configured to receive at least one faceplate. The skateboard has a motherboard which further has a top side, a bottom side, a front end, and a rear end. The motherboard is symmetrical about a central axis which runs from the front end to the rear end. A forward truck and a rearward truck area attached to the motherboard. A plurality of forward slots are arranged symmetrically about the central axis on the motherboard. A plurality of slots are arranged symmetrically about the central axis on the motherboard. The plurality of slots are adapted to receive the at least one faceplate.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A skateboard configured to receive at least one faceplate, the skateboard comprising: a motherboard further comprising a top side, a bottom side, a front end, and a rear end; wherein the motherboard is symmetrical about a central axis which runs from the front end to the rear end; a forward truck and a rearward truck, attached to the motherboard; a plurality of forward slots arranged symmetrically about the central axis on the motherboard; a plurality of central forward slots arranged symmetrically about the central axis on the motherboard; a plurality of central slots arranged symmetrically about the central axis on the motherboard; a plurality of central rearward slots arranged symmetrically about the central axis on the motherboard; and a plurality of rearward slots arranged symmetrically about the central axis on the motherboard; wherein the plurality of forward slots, the plurality of central forward slots, the plurality of central slots, the plurality of central rearward slots, and the plurality of rearward slots are adapted to receive the at least one faceplate. 2. The skateboard of Claim 1, further comprising: a plurality of forward male snap fasteners, attached to the motherboard and configured to join the motherboard to the at least one faceplate; and a plurality of rearward male snap fasteners, attached to the motherboard and configured to join the motherboard to the at least one faceplate. 3. The skateboard of Claim 2, wherein the at least one faceplate is a first faceplate and a second faceplate. 4. The skateboard of Claim 3, wherein the first faceplate further comprises: a plurality of forward first side posts configured to mate with the plurality of forward slots 

 a plurality of central forward first side posts configured to mate with some of the plurality of central forward slots; a central first side post configured to mate with one of the plurality of central slots; a plurality of central rearward first side posts configured to mate with some of the plurality of central rearward slots; and a plurality of rearward first side posts configured to mate with some of the plurality of rearward slots. 5. The skateboard of Claim 4, wherein the second faceplate further comprises: a plurality of forward second side posts configured to mate with the plurality of forward slots a plurality of central forward second side posts configured to mate with some of the plurality of central forward slots; a central second side post configured to mate with one of the plurality of central slots; a plurality of central rearward second side posts configured to mate with some of the plurality of central rearward slots; and a plurality of rearward second side posts configured to mate with some of the plurality of rearward slots. 6. The skateboard of Claim 3, wherein the first faceplate further comprises: a plurality of first side forward female snap fasteners configured to mate with some of the plurality of forward male snap fasteners; and a plurality of first side rearward female snap fasteners configured to mate with some of the plurality of rearward male snap fasteners. 7. The skateboard of Claim 6, wherein the second faceplate further comprises: a plurality of second side forward female snap fasteners configured to mate with some of the plurality of forward male snap fasteners; and a plurality of second side rearward female snap fasteners configured to mate with some of the plurality of rearward male snap fasteners.
